name: Alpaca 7B
note: LLaMA 7B fine-tuned on 52K self-instruct demos for under $600; sparked the open instruction-tuning wave.
verificationNotes: Confirmed real release via crfm.stanford.edu/2023/03/13/alpaca.html (blog post dated 2023-03-13, exactly matching releaseDate). Confirmed via direct fetch of tatsu-lab/stanford_alpaca GitHub repo: three-license split is accurate (code = Apache 2.0, data = CC BY NC 4.0, weight diff = CC BY NC 4.0) and training used a 512-token max sequence length, matching ctxK 0.512. Confirmed the head-to-head result: CRFM blog states 'Alpaca wins 90 versus 89 comparisons against text-davinci-003' — 90+89=179, matching the record's '90 of 179' framing and the 50.3% win rate (90/179≈50.3%). paramsB 6.7 matches the well-documented actual parameter count of the 'LLaMA-7B' base model. No changes to values were needed.
